'''dhahate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:rheostatically|rheostatically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-h-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rheostatically|rheostatically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dhahate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:dhahate|dhahate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dhahatesher|dhahatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhahatesherĂ«m|dhahatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhahatero|dhahatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhahateshĂ«|dhahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhahateshĂ«m|dhahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhahatero|gokidhahatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhahateshĂ«|gokidhahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhahateshĂ«m|gokidhahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godhahankerom|godhahankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhahankeshĂ«|godhahankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhahankeshĂ«m|godhahankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godhahankeya|godhahankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhahaterom|dhahaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhahatemu|dhahatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dhahateya|dhahateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhahaterom|gokidhahaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhahatemu|gokidhahatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidhahateya|gokidhahateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:dhahahate|dhahahate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dhahahatesher|dhahahatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhahahatesherĂ«m|dhahahatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhahahatero|dhahahatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhahahateshĂ«|dhahahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhahahateshĂ«m|dhahahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhahahatero|gokidhahahatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhahahateshĂ«|gokidhahahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhahahateshĂ«m|gokidhahahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godhahahankerom|godhahahankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhahahankeshĂ«|godhahahankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhahahankeshĂ«m|godhahahankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godhahahankeya|godhahahankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhahahaterom|dhahahaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhahahatemu|dhahahatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dhahahateya|dhahahateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhahahaterom|gokidhahahaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhahahatemu|gokidhahahatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidhahahateya|gokidhahahateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:dhĂŠhĂŠte|dhĂŠhĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dhĂŠhĂŠtesher|dhĂŠhĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhĂŠhĂŠtesherĂ«m|dhĂŠhĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhĂŠhĂŠtero|dhĂŠhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«|dhĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m|dhĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠhĂŠtero|gokidhĂŠhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«|gokidhĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m|gokidhĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godhĂŠhĂŠnkerom|godhĂŠhĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«|godhĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«m|godhĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godhĂŠhĂŠnkeya|godhĂŠhĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhĂŠhĂŠterom|dhĂŠhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhĂŠhĂŠtemu|dhĂŠhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dhĂŠhĂŠteya|dhĂŠhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠhĂŠterom|gokidhĂŠhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠhĂŠtemu|gokidhĂŠhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠhĂŠteya|gokidhĂŠhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:dhafhafte|dhafhafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dhafhaftesher|dhafhaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhafhaftesherĂ«m|dhafhaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhafhaftero|dhafhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhafhafteshĂ«|dhafhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhafhafteshĂ«m|dhafhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhafhaftero|gokidhafhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhafhafteshĂ«|gokidhafhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhafhafteshĂ«m|gokidhafhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godhafhafnkerom|godhafhafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhafhafnkeshĂ«|godhafhafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhafhafnkeshĂ«m|godhafhafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godhafhafnkeya|godhafhafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhafhafterom|dhafhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhafhaftemu|dhafhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dhafhafteya|dhafhafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhafhafterom|gokidhafhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhafhaftemu|gokidhafhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidhafhafteya|gokidhafhafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
